case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. A S TYNAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT POS BY MAIL, DUE DILIGENCE ATTACHED, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK SERVED JAN-30-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TYNAN, A S
